questions.question: Describe the difference between a physical schema and a conceptual schema in a database management system.
questions.hint: A physical schema defines the storage and organization of data, whereas a conceptual schema defines the structure and relationships between data entities.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a user schema in a database management system?
questions.hint: A user schema defines the structure and organization of data for a specific user or application.

questions.question: Explain the concept of schema evolution in a database management system.
questions.hint: Schema evolution refers to the process of modifying or extending the existing schema in response to changing business requirements or new data requirements.
